features.name: case equality operator with high-impedance operand
features.description: Code should include a case equality operator (===) comparing a variable to a high-impedance (z) value

features.name: case inequality operator with high-impedance operand
features.description: Code should include a case inequality operator (!==) comparing a variable to a high-impedance (z) value

features.name: high-impedance literal assignment in combinational logic
features.description: Code should include a logic variable initialized with high-impedance (1'bz) used in equality comparisons
